items.title: Cloudflare Optimizes Edge Stack for High-Core CPUs Instead of Large Cache
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Optimizes Edge Stack for High-Core CPUs Instead of Large Cache. Cloudflare recently introduced its Gen 13 servers, marking a shift in how its network handles traffic.

items.title: Yelp Achieves Zero-Downtime Upgrade of over 1,000 Cassandra Nodes
items.summaryShort: Yelp Achieves Zero-Downtime Upgrade of over 1,000 Cassandra Nodes. Yelp has completed a large-scale upgrade of its Apache Cassandra infrastructure, spanning more than 1,000 nodes, without any service downtime, offering a blueprint for manag

items.title: Presentation: Deepfakes, Disinformation, and AI Content Are Taking Over the Internet
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Deepfakes, Disinformation, and AI Content Are Taking Over the Internet. Shuman Ghosemajumder explains how generative AI has transformed from a creative curiosity into a high-scale tool for disinformation and fraud.

items.title: Article: Orchestrating Agentic and Multimodal AI Pipelines with Apache Camel
items.summaryShort: Article: Orchestrating Agentic and Multimodal AI Pipelines with Apache Camel. In this article, author Vignesh Durai discusses how agentic and multimodal AI systems can be engineered using Apache Camel and LangChain4j technologies.

items.title: HashiCorp Vault 2.0 Marks Shift to IBM Lifecycle with New Identity Federation
items.summaryShort: HashiCorp Vault 2.0 Marks Shift to IBM Lifecycle with New Identity Federation. HashiCorp has released Vault 2.0, moving to the IBM versioning and support model following its acquisition.

items.title: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce
items.summaryShort: Anthropic created a test marketplace for agent-on-agent commerce. In a recent experiment, Anthropic created a classified marketplace where AI agents represented both buyers and sellers, striking real deals for real goods and real money.

items.title: Maine's governor vetoes data center moratorium
items.summaryShort: Maine's governor vetoes data center moratorium. L.D.

items.title: OpenAI CEO apologizes to Tumbler Ridge community
